items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: yesterday: "MV is in the final stage of negotiations to sign for mcl" today: "MV might end up i…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：昨天：“MV 正处于与 MCL 签约的最后谈判阶段。”今天：“MV 有可能最终加入 MCL，但现在下定论还为时过早。”同一个人，24 小时之内说了完全相反的话。不管这些说法是真是假，F1 领域的新闻报道水平已经跌到了历史最低点。
items.summary: yesterday: "MV is in the final stage of negotiations to sign for mcl" today: "MV might end up in mcl, but saying that right now is misleading" same person, 24h apart. regardless of whether either, both, or none are true, the state of journalism in f1 is at an all time low
items.summary_zh: 昨天：“MV 正处于与 MCL 签约的最后谈判阶段。”今天：“MV 有可能最终加入 MCL，但现在下定论还为时过早。”同一个人，24 小时之内说了完全相反的话。不管这些说法是真是假，F1 领域的新闻报道水平已经跌到了历史最低点。

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: oscar: "it's like a papaya, ew!" lando: "i don't wanna touch it! people eat that, that's crazy"…

items.summary: oscar: "it's like a papaya, ew!" lando: "i don't wanna touch it! people eat that, that's crazy" 🚨 BREAKING NEWS: Oscar Piastri and Lando Norris have made their disgust towards papaya clear. Max Verstappen is in the last stages of negotiation for BOTH seats at McLaren next year. https://t.co/7sTfJsj1y5

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: "i used the boost, caught george in the straight but too close to the corner, so i had to break…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：“我使用了加速功能，在直道上追上了乔治，但当时距离弯道太近了，不得不减速。白白浪费了很多能量。不过我使用加速功能只是为了把查尔斯甩在后面而已，而他并没有使用该功能。所以最后，我其实并不需要再使用加速功能了。”他真他妈讨厌这些规则啊😭
items.summary: "i used the boost, caught george in the straight but too close to the corner, so i had to break. this was a whole bunch of energy for no reason, but i only used it to keep charles behind, and he didnt use it, so in the end i didnt need to use it." he fucking hates these regs 😭 https://t.co/oPDTpsxyQf
items.summary_zh: “我使用了加速功能，在直道上追上了乔治，但当时距离弯道太近了，不得不减速。白白浪费了很多能量。不过我使用加速功能只是为了把查尔斯甩在后面而已，而他并没有使用该功能。所以最后，我其实并不需要再使用加速功能了。”他真他妈讨厌这些规则啊😭

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: oscar says there's a big element of luck to overtaking now: "some moves are still very good, bu…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：Oscar表示，现在超车很大程度上取决于运气：“有些超车动作确实很出色，但有些则不然。当你想要完成一次精彩的超车动作时，却因为能量差异而被对手超越，真是令人遗憾。”
items.summary: oscar says there's a big element of luck to overtaking now: "some moves are still very good, but some really arent. it's a shame in the car when you like to do something great, and then you just get passed again [due to the energy difference]." https://t.co/J3LZ6VVId8
items.summary_zh: Oscar表示，现在超车很大程度上取决于运气：“有些超车动作确实很出色，但有些则不然。当你想要完成一次精彩的超车动作时，却因为能量差异而被对手超越，真是令人遗憾。”

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: the clauses in oscar's contract change nothing. we've been having this conversation for MONTHS…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：Oscar的合同中的那些条款根本没有任何意义。我们已经讨论这个问题好几个月了，但结果总是一样的：McLaren团队一再强调那些说法毫无根据。今天再次提起这个话题，只是因为一条与 F1 毫无关系的推文而已。
items.summary: the clauses in oscar's contract change nothing. we've been having this conversation for MONTHS and it always ends the same: with the whole mclaren team confirming it's nonsense. the only reason it's been brought up again today is because of a tweet that wasnt even about f1.
items.summary_zh: Oscar的合同中的那些条款根本没有任何意义。我们已经讨论这个问题好几个月了，但结果总是一样的：McLaren团队一再强调那些说法毫无根据。今天再次提起这个话题，只是因为一条与 F1 毫无关系的推文而已。

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: oscar: "apart from my home crowd i think this is probably the next best crowd. and there's some…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：Oscar：“除了我的家乡观众之外，我觉得这里的人也是最棒的观众了。而且这里还有澳大利亚人呢！我听到你们的声音了，谢谢！这个周末的天气也相当温暖，真是难得。” 克罗夫蒂：“这样会让人感觉更像在家一样，对吧？” Oscar：“不。” 😭😭😭😭😭
items.summary: oscar: "apart from my home crowd i think this is probably the next best crowd. and there's some aussies here! i can hear you, thank you! the weather was also quite warm this weekend, which is rare" crofty: "makes you feel more at home, right?" oscar: "no." 😭😭😭😭😭 https://t.co/ZaA8PkWEGN
items.summary_zh: Oscar：“除了我的家乡观众之外，我觉得这里的人也是最棒的观众了。而且这里还有澳大利亚人呢！我听到你们的声音了，谢谢！这个周末的天气也相当温暖，真是难得。” 克罗夫蒂：“这样会让人感觉更像在家一样，对吧？” Oscar：“不。” 😭😭😭😭😭

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: How do you leave this weekend from a performance perspective? "I mean we weren't great, obvi…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问：从比赛表现来看，如何评价这个周末的表现呢？“显然，我们的表现并不理想。不过，我们很早就意识到了这一点。虽然落后这么多确实让我们有些意外，但某种程度上也并不意外。我们本来就预计Ferrari在奥地利会表现得很快，但实际上他们并没有做到。而他们能赢得比赛，倒真是有点出乎意料。不过，我们觉得Ferrari确实比我们强一些，事实就是如此。”
items.summary: Q: How do you leave this weekend from a performance perspective? "I mean we weren't great, obviously. But we knew that from pretty early on. I think being such a step behind was a little bit of a surprise for us but in some ways also not. I think we expected Ferrari to be quick in Austria and they weren't. And here wasn't a huge surprise that they were quick. The fact that they were able to go and win the race, was a bit surprising. But we felt they were definitely a step ahead of us so that's where we are."
items.summary_zh: 问：从比赛表现来看，如何评价这个周末的表现呢？“显然，我们的表现并不理想。不过，我们很早就意识到了这一点。虽然落后这么多确实让我们有些意外，但某种程度上也并不意外。我们本来就预计Ferrari在奥地利会表现得很快，但实际上他们并没有做到。而他们能赢得比赛，倒真是有点出乎意料。不过，我们觉得Ferrari确实比我们强一些，事实就是如此。”

items.title_zh: X 转帖 @oscarsspiastree：Oscar Piastri在银石赛道的表现： 2023 年：因安全车的介入而错失个人在 F1 赛场上的首个领奖台机会。 2024 年：由于McLaren的战术失误，错失了领奖台和获胜的机会。 2025 年：尽管在整个比赛中处于领先地位，但因安全车干预而最终未能获胜。 2026 年：因赛车受损，排名立即跌至第 21 位。
